blended.narrative: Burke Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,723 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
